# Regeffects
Predicting RNA expression from RNA sequence representations and regulatory features
* Part 1) Data Generation:
  * RNA Sequence Representations generated by PlantCaduceus
  * Chromatin Accessibility Prediction generated by A2Z
* Part 2) Training and Bayesian Hyperparameter Optimization with Optuna
  * command line for base model:
    `python train.py --val_group 1 --test_group 2`
  * command line for full models:
    `python train.py --val_group 1 --test_group 2 --extra`
* Part 3) Computational Tests
* Part 4) Experimental Tests and Validating the Predictions
